overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character walking through a desolate volcanic landscape toward a distant tower. The environment transitions from mountainous inland terrain with snow-capped peaks to coastal cliffs overlooking the ocean under an overcast sky with light precipitation.

scene_state.functional_zone: volcanic mountain valley with snow-capped peaks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through rocky terrain carrying a large cargo backpack with glowing blue lights

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with snow visible on the upper slopes against the grey sky
tall thin vertical structure visible on the horizon
dark black volcanic rock covering the ground with patches of brown grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide volcanic valley with dark rocky terrain under an overcast sky. A snow-capped mountain rises on the left while a distant tower stands on the horizon ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal transition zone with ocean view opening

events.description: ocean becomes visible on the right horizon as the terrain opens up to the coast

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the landscape reveals the ocean on the right side

entered.detail: grey ocean water visible on the right horizon meeting the cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the snow-capped mountain disappears behind and the terrain opens to reveal the ocean on the right. The distant tower remains visible ahead while the path continues through the dark volcanic rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path overlooking the ocean

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal cliff edge toward the distant tower with the ocean visible to the right

entered.detail: edge of the cliff dropping down to the ocean water below

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a coastal cliff path with the ocean now prominent on the right side. The distant tower appears slightly closer as the journey continues through the desolate volcanic landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate volcanic valley that gradually opens into a sweeping coastal cliffside. It begins with the character traversing dark rocky terrain under an overcast sky, with a snow-capped mountain looming to the left and a distant tower marking the horizon. As the character progresses, the mountain recedes behind the camera and the landscape expands to reveal the ocean appearing on the right. The scene then shifts further along the coast, where the ocean becomes a prominent feature beside the path while the distant tower draws slightly closer. Finally, the journey continues across the stark volcanic landscape, maintaining a steady trajectory toward the far-off structure.
